class.name: ARMeshAnchor
class.brief_description: A scene-reconstruction mesh anchored in world space.
class.description: Represents a chunk of reconstructed scene geometry. Mesh anchors expose vertices, normals, triangle indices, and optional per-face classifications such as wall, floor, or table. These anchors are useful for occlusion, physics, spatial understanding, and procedural mesh generation.

method.name: get_face_classification
method.description: Returns the semantic classification for the triangle face at [param faceIndex].

method.name: get_normal
method.description: Returns the surface normal at vertex [param index].

method.name: get_vertex
method.description: Returns the mesh vertex at [param index].

members.member: Semantic classification value for each mesh face.
Normal vectors for the mesh vertices.
A unique identifier for this mesh anchor.
The mesh anchor transform in world space.
Triangle index data for the reconstructed mesh.

constants.constant: No semantic classification is available for this face.
The mesh face is classified as a wall.
The mesh face is classified as a floor.
The mesh face is classified as a ceiling.
The mesh face is classified as a table-like surface.
The mesh face is classified as a seat.
The mesh face is classified as a window.
The mesh face is classified as a door.
